case_title: CACH, LLC VS. JOHN A BARNHILL ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BARNHILL, JOHN A BARNHILL CAPITAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-06-2016
DECLARATION CCP 585 DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 100006904) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNHILL, JOHN A $16,220.12 PRINCIPAL, $960.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $470.35 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,650.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100006904)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-25-2016 CONTINUED TO MAR-28-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-25-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
